Georgia, statewide

Criminal Defense Lawyers in Georgia

427 listings statewide

Compare top rated criminal defense lawyers across Georgia. We list 427 criminal & dui practices, both established law firms and solo attorneys, with ratings, reviews, and direct contact. Criminal cases in Georgia are heard in Magistrate, State, and Superior courts depending on the charge. Acting quickly matters, and many criminal defense lawyers offer a free first consultation and flat-fee representation.

Frequently asked questions

How many criminal defense lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 427 criminal defense lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a criminal defense lawyer in Georgia?

Criminal cases in Georgia are heard in Magistrate, State, and Superior courts depending on the charge. Acting quickly matters, and many criminal defense lawyers offer a free first consultation and flat-fee representation.

Who is a top criminal defense lawyer in Georgia?

The Atlantic Law Firm in Savannah is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 435 reviews.
